items: The following checks should be made prior to performing the inspection
The condition of the air cleaner element, ignition timing, spark plug electrodes, and blow-by gas reduction system must be in good working order.
The PGM-FI warning light should not be illuminated.

blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat.
Start the engine, operate the radiator fan twice, and then warm up the engine for at least 2 minutes at 3,000 rpm with no load.
With the steering wheel in the straight ahead position, check the headlight, blower motor, rear defroster, radiator fan, A/C, etc. after at least one minute of no-load operation.

items: If the specified idling rpm cannot be maintained, Inspect according to the symptom-based failure diagnosis table.

blocks.text: Turn on the A/C switch, set the A/C temperature to the lowest setting, set the blower fan to maximum airflow, turn on the rear defroster, and set the headlights to "HI" and check after at least one minute with the compressor running.

items: If the specified idling rpm cannot be maintained, Inspect according to the symptom-based failure diagnosis table.
